message: ci: fix windows swift path and lint

files.patch:
@@ -43,6 +43,22 @@ jobs:
         branch: swift-6.2-release
         tag: 6.2-RELEASE
 
+    - name: Ensure Swift CLI available (Windows)
+      if: runner.os == 'Windows'
+      shell: pwsh
+      run: |
+        $swiftExe = Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\Users\runneradmin\AppData\Local\Programs\Swift" -Filter swift.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1
+        if (-not $swiftExe) {
+          $swiftExe = Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\Library\Developer" -Filter swift.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1
+        }
+        if (-not $swiftExe) {
+          throw "Swift executable not found after installation."
+        }
+        $dir = Split-Path $swiftExe.FullName
+        Add-Content -Path $env:GITHUB_PATH -Value $dir
+        Write-Host "Added $dir to PATH"
+        swift --version
+
     - name: Cache Swift Package Manager
       uses: actions/cache@v4
       with:
@@ -111,6 +127,22 @@ jobs:

+        if (-not $swiftExe) {
+          $swiftExe = Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\Library\Developer" -Filter swift.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1

+        if (-not $swiftExe) {
+          throw "Swift executable not found after installation."

+        $dir = Split-Path $swiftExe.FullName
+        Add-Content -Path $env:GITHUB_PATH -Value $dir
+        Write-Host "Added $dir to PATH"

+
     - name: Build Examples
       run: |
         swift build --package-path . -c release

@@ -114,6 +114,20 @@ jobs:
         with:
           branch: swift-6.2-release
           tag: 6.2-RELEASE
+      - name: Ensure Swift CLI available (Windows)
+        shell: pwsh
+        run: |
+          $swiftExe = Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\Users\runneradmin\AppData\Local\Programs\Swift" -Filter swift.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1

+            $swiftExe = Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\Library\Developer" -Filter swift.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1
+          }
+          if (-not $swiftExe) {
+            throw "Swift executable not found after installation."
+          }
+          $dir = Split-Path $swiftExe.FullName
+          Add-Content -Path $env:GITHUB_PATH -Value $dir
+          Write-Host "Added $dir to PATH"
+          swift --version
       
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: |

@@ -149,6 +149,20 @@ jobs:
       with:
         branch: swift-${{ matrix.swift-version }}-release
         tag: ${{ matrix.swift-version }}-RELEASE
+    - name: Ensure Swift CLI available (Windows)
+      shell: pwsh
+      run: |
+        $swiftExe = Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\Users\runneradmin\AppData\Local\Programs\Swift" -Filter swift.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1
+        if (-not $swiftExe) {
+          $swiftExe = Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\Library\Developer" -Filter swift.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1
+        }
+        if (-not $swiftExe) {
+          throw "Swift executable not found after installation."
+        }
+        $dir = Split-Path $swiftExe.FullName
+        Add-Content -Path $env:GITHUB_PATH -Value $dir
+        Write-Host "Added $dir to PATH"
+        swift --version
 
     - name: Cache Swift Package Manager
       uses: actions/cache@v4
